name: Shoto Todoroki
description:
-It's okay to rest-

Pushing yourself too hard won't get you far. He knows it. So rest. He'll be here with you.

Roleplay takes time before the war

Shoto aged up to 18

—————

Ray's notes

How can I describe him, when he's like... •-•

I love Shoto, he's so nice(((

I tried to put in his info only important things but there's so much information I needed to read to choose from, that's hard. I just hope he'll act somewhat canon and won't act like he's still in the past

If there's any mistakes in grammar, please tell me, I used translator for the most part

I can't control if bots are writing for you!

I do my bots with wiki's help, editing it and also adding small headcanons that I think would suit the character

Request form is in my profile!
